summary: PLAN_REVIEW for add-coordinator-kanban-viz completed across 3 rounds. Round 1: 29 findings → 9 load-bearing fixes (commit df97e30). Round 2: convergence engine returned 0 blocking (relaxed-unconfirmed semantics because max_rounds=1 makes round 1 the final round); manual cross-vendor matching found 6 issues independently flagged by 2+ vendors as critical/high → applied surgical fixes (commit e7a12d6). Round 3: codex returned valid findings, claude_code + gemini failed JSON parse → engine returned quorum_lost; codex's 8 findings surfaced 6 residual consistency issues → applied polish fixes (commit eccf9fe). Outcome: converged. openspec validate add-coordinator-kanban-viz --strict passes after every round.

deferred_findings.summary: SSE design assumes coordinator_task trigger covers all work-queue transitions and can produce from/to events
deferred_findings.rationale_for_defer: Requires DB schema introspection during IMPLEMENT to confirm trigger payload shape; not a plan-level blocker

deferred_findings.summary: D10 says coordinator owns saved-view/audit writes for boundary, but allows Tauri to bypass
deferred_findings.rationale_for_defer: Intentional v1 architectural choice — Tauri has filesystem access; design D10 explicitly notes the runtime feature-detect for the two paths and asserts on-disk-format identity. Not a contradiction; the boundary is 'browser cannot bypass', Tauri is not the browser.

process_notes: Vendor finding IDs use different schemes (claude_code: PLAN_REVIEW_R1_NNN, codex: topic-slug-style, gemini: free-form) so consensus_synthesizer's text-matching couldn't pair semantically-identical findings — manual cross-vendor matching was required for round 2.

Sanitized vendor criticality 'major'/'minor'/'blocker' → 'high'/'low'/'critical' inline via monkey-patch of checkpoint_findings.write_vendor_findings and consensus_synthesizer.Finding.from_dict; otherwise gemini findings crashed the validator.

Convergence loop was invoked with max_rounds=1 (round-by-round caller-driven cadence per the autopilot sub-agent contract), which means 'final round' semantics relax unconfirmed findings; this is why round 2 reported 0 blocking despite substantive issues. The autopilot orchestrator should consider invoking with max_rounds=N and capturing intermediate-round blockers separately.
next_steps: Phase IMPLEMENT can begin — work-packages.yaml DAG ready
